creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
er, neither gqrx nor gnuradion failed to build

x11-toolkits/py-wxPython30 did.  Look at the log. 
You neglected to say what your build machine is.
However, if it's FreeBSD 11 the issue is probably known:

http://portsmon.freebsd.org/portoverview.py?category=x11-toolkits&portname=py-wxPython30

assigning to maintainer
